recipes.name: Nightcap Antidote
recipes.description: Neutralizes nightcap root poisoning. Elara must teach you first.

recipes.name: Druidfire Torch
recipes.description: A torch that burns with green flame. Can sever magical bonds.

recipes.name: Tongueloose Draught
recipes.description: Makes the drinker more... forthcoming. Use during dialogue for bonus options.

recipes.name: Smoke Bomb
recipes.description: Creates a cloud of obscuring smoke. Useful for escaping or sneaking.

recipes.name: Moonpetal Tea
recipes.description: Lets you hear the forest's voice for a brief time. Old Maren's recipe.
